stemHtml: You are flying on a magnetic heading (MH) of 185° and your location is in the northern hemisphere. The relative bearing of an NDB is indicated on your relative bearing indicator as 065°. What true bearing should be plotted from the beacon to the aircraft on a Lambert chart if the variation at the aircraft is 6°E and the variation at the station is 4°E and the chart convergence between the aircraft and the NDB is 8°?
